skill.name: codex-review
skill.description: Professional code review with automated CHANGELOG generation powered by Codex AI
skill.summary: Automated code review and changelog generation for streamlined development workflows
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: All static analysis findings were false positives. The SKILL.md file is documentation-only markdown with no executable code. Referenced external commands (npx) and URLs are installation instructions and documentation links, not actual code execution or network calls. No cryptographic operations exist.

evidence.reasoning: Markdown code block showing npm installation command, not executable code
Documentation URL linking to GitHub repository, not network code

content.user_title: Automate Code Reviews and Changelogs with Codex
content.value_statement: Manual code reviews are time-consuming and changelogs are often neglected. This skill automates both using Codex AI, ensuring consistent quality and up-to-date documentation.
actual_capabilities: Analyzes code changes and provides professional review feedback
Generates CHANGELOG entries automatically from code modifications
Integrates with Codex AI for intelligent code understanding
limitations: Requires Codex CLI to be installed and configured
Needs CHANGELOG.md file in project root for updates
Review quality depends on code context availability
Cannot execute or test the reviewed code

use_cases.title: Pre-commit Code Review
use_cases.description: Get automated feedback on code changes before committing to catch issues early

use_cases.title: Automated Changelog Maintenance
use_cases.description: Keep CHANGELOG.md updated automatically as code evolves without manual effort

use_cases.title: Large Refactoring Analysis
use_cases.description: Review extensive code changes systematically to ensure nothing is overlooked

prompt_templates.title: Basic Code Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my recent code changes and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, and improvements

prompt_templates.title: Changelog Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze the modified files and generate appropriate CHANGELOG.md entries following conventional changelog format
prompt_templates.scenario: After completing a feature or fix

prompt_templates.title: Security-Focused Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this code with focus on security vulnerabilities, input validation, and potential attack vectors
prompt_templates.scenario: Handling sensitive data or user input

prompt_templates.title: Refactoring Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this large-scale refactoring and verify that functionality is preserved while code quality improves

output_examples.output: Code Review Summary: 3 improvements suggested. Password hashing uses secure algorithm. Consider adding rate limiting for login attempts. Variable naming follows PEP 8 standards.
CHANGELOG entries generated: Added user authentication module, Fixed session timeout bug, Updated dependencies to latest versions

best_practices: Keep CHANGELOG.md in your project root before using this skill
Use conventional commit messages for accurate changelog generation
Run reviews on feature branches before merging to main
anti_patterns: Do not skip review for small changes - bugs often hide in simple code
Avoid committing without reviewing security-sensitive changes
Do not rely solely on automated review for critical system changes

faq.question: What is required to use this skill?
faq.answer: You need Codex CLI installed and configured, and a CHANGELOG.md file in your project root.

faq.question: Can this skill execute my code?
faq.answer: No, this skill only analyzes and reviews code. It does not execute or test the code.

faq.question: What commit format works best?
faq.answer: Conventional commits (feat:, fix:, chore:, etc.) provide the best results for changelog generation.

faq.question: Does this work with private repositories?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill operates locally on your code and does not send code to external services.

faq.question: How detailed are the code reviews?
faq.answer: Reviews cover code quality, potential bugs, style consistency, and improvement suggestions based on best practices.

faq.question: Can I customize the changelog format?
faq.answer: The skill follows conventional changelog format by default. Refer to the repository for customization options.
